Further classification of Willichia callitrichoides may include its order and family within the plant kingdom.

intro: Willichia callitrichoides, also known as Willichia, is a tropical plant species native to the Amazon region, belonging to the family Annonaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of various diseases such as arthritis and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Willichia callitrichoides include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which have been identified as the key compounds responsible for its medicinal properties.
